channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI analysis of 400,000 Reddit posts reveals hidden Ozempic side effects
item.description: Researchers analyzed Reddit posts to find unexpected symptoms reported by users of GLP-1 weight-loss drugs.

item.title: Scientists may have found source of most powerful neutrino ever detected
item.description: The most energetic neutrino ever recorded was detected in the Mediterranean Sea, sparking scientific excitement.

item.title: Atoms found spinning backward in quantum experiment
item.description: Scientists observed angular momentum moving through a crystal for the first time, revealing an unexpected twist.

item.title: Oldest known wooden tools discovered, dating back 430,000 years
item.description: Researchers have uncovered the oldest hand-held wooden tools ever used by humans, estimated at 430,000 years old.
